runners.spotlight: Didn't start career off in style but was a rapid improver after landing a Chepstow novice in September, which ended in a 7f Listed race success on heavy at Saint-Cloud in November; seems to act on any ground and only issue might be is that she's vulnerable to something less exposed; entered in the Pouliches.
runners.comment: Rapid improver after landing a Chepstow novice in September; chance but vulnerable

runners.name: My Highness
runners.spotlight: Looked potentially top-class as a 2yo, and sets the standard having won the C&D Prix du Calvados on good ground in August when last seen, beating a solid yardstick in the process; slight concern that she wasn't seen after that but could be the one to beat if returning in similar form; entered in the 1000 Guineas, plus the Pouliches and Prix Diane.
runners.comment: Sets the standard having won the C&D Prix du Calvados in August; big chance

runners.name: Isle Of Fernandez
runners.spotlight: The booking of Christophe Soumillon catches the eye but no doubt this British raider needs to find more considering she was only fourth in the Listed Two Year Old Trophy (6f, good to soft) at Redcar when last seen; sole win come on soft but needs improvement for the return to 7f; entered in the Pouliches.
runners.comment: The booking of Christophe Soumillon catches the eye but this British raider needs more

runners.name: Inju
runners.spotlight: Related to plenty of smart performers and won here on the AW over 6.5f on debut in January; has progressed on the figures since despite not adding to that, beaten only 2l in a 5.5f Chantilly Listed event last month on heavy having gone off a 28-1 chance; yet to race over 7f but dam side of pedigree has plenty of stamina in it.
runners.comment: Only debuted in Jan but progessed on the figures on every run; new trip today

runners.name: Baklawa
runners.spotlight: Won't lack for experience or race-fitness and beat a gelding who ran in the Prix Djebel earlier on the card when last seen, but was over 4.5l behind Half Sovereign in the Group 3 Prix Miesque (7f, very soft) in October, so has work to do with that rival.
runners.comment: Won't lack for experience or race-fitness but others may improve past her

runners.name: Zalina
runners.spotlight: Impressed when winning here over a mile on good to soft on debut in August, but wasn't close to that level on her return to action last month in a mile Listed event at Saint-Cloud on heavy; blinkers go on but plenty more needed; entered in the Pouliches.
runners.comment: Not at her best on her 3yo return but blinkers go on

runners.name: Showna
runners.spotlight: Over 4l behind Zalina in a mile maiden here last August and didn't win until landing a handicap here over 6.5f on the AW in January; readily held in a Listed event on Polytrack a month ago as a 16-1 shot, and needs plenty more returning to turf to trouble the best of these.
runners.comment: Hasn't done enough yet to suggest she can win a race like this

runners.name: Piana
runners.spotlight: Already had plenty of racing, mostly only achieving a fair level even in success, which was over 6f on very soft, but took her form up a notch when a 28-1 winner of a mile Listed event at Meydan in February on good ground; can't knock her with regards to being in form and clearly race-fit, so should be involved in the finish.
runners.comment: Took her form up a notch when a 28-1 winner of a mile Listed event at Meydan in February

runners.name: Kozlovskha
runners.spotlight: Fourth on debut before winning at Le Mans in October (7f, soft) and then beaten only a length by a colt (who runs in the Prix Djebel) in a 7f Listed event at Deauville on the AW when last seen in November; needs more but has the scope for improvement on this return to action.
runners.comment: Produced her best ever when last seen when second to a colt; can do better

runners.name: Valasara
runners.spotlight: Unbeaten in two starts, both wins coming here, the first over 6f beating stablemate Repel and then in a 5f Listed event in August on good to soft; not 100% certain to be suited by 7f on pedigree, especially if the ground genuinely rides soft, but represents leading connections who can never be left out of calculations; entered in the 1000 Guineas and Pouliches (French 1000).
runners.comment: Unbeaten as a 2yo but untested at this trip; may get7f judged by pedigree

runners.name: Repel
runners.spotlight: Finished second to Valasara here over 6f on good ground last July before winning down to 5.5f here as well; going up to this trip doesn't look a problem on pedigree and stable quite capable of readying one after a break; entered in the Pouliches.
runners.comment: Should stay this trip on pedigree and has lots of scope for improvement

races.name: Prix Cor de Chasse (Listed Race) (Turf)
